message: feat: expand speech model catalog semantics

 struct SpeechModelDescriptor: Equatable {
     var id: String

     var backend: SpeechModelBackend
     var whisperVariant: String?
     var cachePathComponents: [String]

+
+    static let whisperTinyEnglish = SpeechModelDescriptor(
+        id: "openai_whisper-tiny.en",
+        title: "Speed",
+        variantLabel: "tiny.en",
+        approximateSizeLabel: "~75 MB",
+        backend: .whisper,
+        whisperVariant: "tiny.en",
+        cachePathComponents: ["models", "openai", "whisper-tiny.en"],
+        fluidAudioVariant: nil,
+        supportsSpeakerFiltering: false
+    )
 
     static let whisperSmallEnglish = SpeechModelDescriptor(
         id: "openai_whisper-small.en",
+        title: "Accuracy",
+        variantLabel: "small.en",
+        approximateSizeLabel: "~466 MB",

-        fluidAudioVariant: nil
+        fluidAudioVariant: nil,
+        supportsSpeakerFiltering: false

+
+    static let whisperSmallMultilingual = SpeechModelDescriptor(
+        id: "openai_whisper-small",
+        title: "Multilingual",
+        variantLabel: "small",
+        approximateSizeLabel: "~466 MB",
+        backend: .whisper,
+        whisperVariant: "small",
+        cachePathComponents: ["models", "openai", "whisper-small"],
+        fluidAudioVariant: nil,
+        supportsSpeakerFiltering: false
+    )
+
+    static let fluidParakeetV3 = SpeechModelDescriptor(
+        id: "fluid_parakeet-v3",
+        title: "Parakeet v3",
+        variantLabel: "25 languages",
+        approximateSizeLabel: "~1.4 GB",
+        backend: .fluidAudio,
+        whisperVariant: nil,
+        cachePathComponents: [],
+        fluidAudioVariant: "v3",
+        supportsSpeakerFiltering: true
     )
+
+    static let `default` = whisperSmallEnglish
+
+    static let catalog = [
+        whisperTinyEnglish,
+        whisperSmallEnglish,
+        whisperSmallMultilingual,
+        fluidParakeetV3
+    ]
+}
+
+extension SpeechModelDescriptor {
+    static func catalogEntry(id: String) -> SpeechModelDescriptor? {
+        catalog.first { $0.id == id }
+    }
 }
 
 @MainActor
 protocol SpeechModelLoading: AnyObject {
     func isCached(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor) async throws -> Bool
     func download(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor, progress: @Sendable @escaping (Double) -> Void) async throws
     func load(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor, whisperOptions: WhisperRuntimeOptions) async throws
+    func resetLoadedModels()
 }

@@ -2,11 +2,28 @@ import XCTest
 @testable import GhostPepper
 
 final class SpeechModelManagerTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testCatalogExposesFourDocumentedSpeechModels() {
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog.map(\.id),
+            [
+                "openai_whisper-tiny.en",
+                "openai_whisper-small.en",
+                "openai_whisper-small",
+                "fluid_parakeet-v3"
+            ]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(SpeechModelDescriptor.default.id, "openai_whisper-small.en")
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog.filter(\.supportsSpeakerFiltering).map(\.id),
+            ["fluid_parakeet-v3"]
+        )
+    }
+
     @MainActor

         let manager = SpeechModelManager(
-            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            catalog: SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog,
             loader: loader
         )

@@ -76,13 +93,74 @@ final class SpeechModelManagerTests: XCTestCase {
         loader.resume()

+
+    @MainActor
+    func testNilLoadRequestUsesConfiguredModelIdentifier() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallMultilingual.id]
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader,
+            configuredModelIDProvider: { SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallMultilingual.id }
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: nil)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.loadedModelID, SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallMultilingual.id)
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.calls, ["isCached:openai_whisper-small", "load:openai_whisper-small"])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testReadySameModelDoesNotReload() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+        loader.calls.removeAll()
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.calls, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.resetCallCount, 0)
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.loadedModelID, SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testSwitchingModelsResetsLoadedEnginesBeforeLoadingNewModel() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [
+            SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id,
+            SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperTinyEnglish.id
+        ]
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+        loader.calls.removeAll()
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperTinyEnglish.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.resetCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            loader.calls,
+            ["isCached:openai_whisper-tiny.en", "load:openai_whisper-tiny.en"]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.loadedModelID, SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperTinyEnglish.id)
+    }
 }
